description.value: Target at close range grows or shrinks one size category. Enlarge: add [[/damage 1 type=to]] damage dice, Misfortune on Stealth. Reduce: subtract [[/damage 1 type=from]] damage dice, Fortune on Stealth. Unwilling targets get [[/save type=fortitude]].

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = no effect (if unwilling)
- 1 = 1 round
- 2 = 1 minute
- 3 = 10 minutes
system.weavingRoll: Space Potential + Space Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
